'''ân-j-h''' ('''najaha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knuckleball|knuckleball]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-j-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knuckleball|knuckleball]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-j-h
|-
! Lemma
| najaha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:najahithi|najahithi]] || [[word:najahiji|najahiji]] || [[word:najahishi|najahishi]] || [[word:najahi|najahi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:najahuthuth|najahuthuth]] || [[word:najahujuj|najahujuj]] || [[word:najahushush|najahushush]] || [[word:najah|najah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:najahuthu|najahuthu]] || [[word:najahuju|najahuju]] || [[word:najahushu|najahushu]] || [[word:najahu|najahu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:najahufuth|najahufuth]] || [[word:najahufuj|najahufuj]] || [[word:najahufush|najahufush]] || [[word:najahuf|najahuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:najahethe|najahethe]] || [[word:najaheje|najaheje]] || [[word:najaheshe|najaheshe]] || [[word:najahe|najahe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:najahothoth|najahothoth]] || [[word:najahojoj|najahojoj]] || [[word:najahoshosh|najahoshosh]] || [[word:najah|najah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:najahotho|najahotho]] || [[word:najahojo|najahojo]] || [[word:najahosho|najahosho]] || [[word:najaho|najaho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:najahofoth|najahofoth]] || [[word:najahofoj|najahofoj]] || [[word:najahofosh|najahofosh]] || [[word:najahof|najahof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:najahĂŠthĂŠ|najahĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:najahĂŠjĂŠ|najahĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:najahĂŠshĂŠ|najahĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:najahĂŠ|najahĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:najahathath|najahathath]] || [[word:najahajaj|najahajaj]] || [[word:najahashash|najahashash]] || [[word:najah|najah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:najahatha|najahatha]] || [[word:najahaja|najahaja]] || [[word:najahasha|najahasha]] || [[word:najaha|najaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:najahafath|najahafath]] || [[word:najahafaj|najahafaj]] || [[word:najahafash|najahafash]] || [[word:najahaf|najahaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:najahasha|najahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gonajahasha|gonajahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokinajahasha|gokinajahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:najahnĂŒsha|najahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gonajahnknĂŒsha|gonajahnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokinajahnĂŒsha|gokinajahnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:najahshĂ«sha|najahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonajahnkshĂ«sha|gonajahnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinajahshĂ«sha|gokinajahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:najahrosha|najahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonajahnkrosha|gonajahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinajahrosha|gokinajahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:najahmusha|najahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gonajahnkmusha|gonajahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinajahmusha|gokinajahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:najahsherasha|najahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gonajahnksherasha|gonajahnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokinajahsherasha|gokinajahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:najahngasha|najahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gonajahnkngasha|gonajahnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokinajahngasha|gokinajahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:najahyasha|najahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gonajahnkyasha|gonajahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokinajahyasha|gokinajahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:najahyamasha|najahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gonajahnkyamasha|gonajahnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokinajahyamasha|gokinajahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:najahnĂŒshĂ«sha|najahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonajahnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gonajahnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinajahnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokinajahnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:najahnĂŒrosha|najahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonajahnknĂŒrosha|gonajahnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinajahnĂŒrosha|gokinajahnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:najahnĂŒmusha|najahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonajahnknĂŒmusha|gonajahnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinajahnĂŒmusha|gokinajahnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:najahshĂ«nĂŒsha|najahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonajahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gonajahnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinajahshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokinajahshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:najahshĂ«rosha|najahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonajahnkshĂ«rosha|gonajahnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinajahshĂ«rosha|gokinajahshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:najahshĂ«musha|najahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonajahnkshĂ«musha|gonajahnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinajahshĂ«musha|gokinajahshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:najahronĂŒsha|najahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonajahnkronĂŒsha|gonajahnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinajahronĂŒsha|gokinajahronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:najahroshĂ«sha|najahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonajahnkroshĂ«sha|gonajahnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinajahroshĂ«sha|gokinajahroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:najahromusha|najahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonajahnkromusha|gonajahnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinajahromusha|gokinajahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:najahmunĂŒsha|najahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonajahnkmunĂŒsha|gonajahnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinajahmunĂŒsha|gokinajahmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:najahmushĂ«sha|najahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonajahnkmushĂ«sha|gonajahnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinajahmushĂ«sha|gokinajahmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:najahmurosha|najahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonajahnkmurosha|gonajahnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinajahmurosha|gokinajahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:najah|najah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŠjĂŠh|nĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:honajah|honajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:honĂŠjĂŠh|honĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonajah|hohonajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonĂŠjĂŠh|hohonĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒnajah|nĂŒnajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŠjĂŠh|nĂŒnĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒnajah|nĂŒnĂŒnajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒnĂŠjĂŠh|nĂŒnĂŒnĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻnajah|nĂŻnajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŠjĂŠh|nĂŻnĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻnajah|nĂŻnĂŻnajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻnĂŠjĂŠh|nĂŻnĂŻnĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lunajah|lunajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lunĂŠjĂŠh|lunĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunajah|lulunajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunĂŠjĂŠh|lulunĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:linajah|linajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:linĂŠjĂŠh|linĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinajah|lilinajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinĂŠjĂŠh|lilinĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:konajah|konajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:konĂŠjĂŠh|konĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonajah|kokonajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonĂŠjĂŠh|kokonĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kenajah|kenajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kenĂŠjĂŠh|kenĂŠjĂŠh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenajah|kekenajah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenĂŠjĂŠh|kekenĂŠjĂŠh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
